response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR scheduled_time : time
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK airplane_id
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar
ATTR registration : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY Location
PK location_id
ATTR location_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrew
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK log_id
ATTR log_id : integer : PK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR status_id : varchar : FK
ATTR log_date : date
ATTR log_time : time

REL Passenger -> Flight : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_id
REL Airport -> Location : 1 -> 1 : FK=location_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatusLog : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_id
REL Flight -> FlightCrew : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_id
REL CrewMember -> FlightCrew : 1 -> 0..N : FK=crew_id
